arts.ttl: Illan Meslier response to huge Leeds United promotion boost speaks volumes after brutal decision
arts.sum: He also left a comment on Jayden Bogle's post, which reads: "Big 3 points (fire emoji) Onto the next!" Darlow also denied Przemyslaw Placheta before Manor Solomon scored the game's only goal, which secured Leeds all three points.

arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Why two ex-Barcelona legends watched Oxford United vs Leeds United as attendance explained
arts.sum: Unlike some other big name former players who have slotted straight into managing Championship or Premier League clubs, Kluivert has taken a different approach, taking up various roles in a whole range of setups. Having gone onto become the sporting director of the Catalan club after his retirement, Jordi has since taken up a role alongside Kluivert as the technical advisor to the Indonesian national team.

arts.ttl: Four Leeds United players have already secured Premier League starting spots
arts.sum: But there are some players who are deserving of a Premier League spot, and four of them showed their class and poise against Oxford United on Good Friday. It is no secret that Leeds United would need a giant squad reconstruction should they book their place in next year’s Premier League campaign.

arts.ttl: St. Pauli strive for permanent purchase of Morgan Guilavogui
arts.sum: The local Hamburger Abendblatt reports that FC St. Pauli are eager to sign attacker Morgan Guilavogui permanently.

arts.ttl: Leeds United, Burnley and Sheffield United points tallies predicted in promotion race
arts.sum: The victory means Leeds have the chance to seal promotion to the Premier League on Easter Monday if they can beat Stoke City at 3pm and Burnley avoid defeat to Sheffield United in the teatime kick off. If Leeds were to draw against the Potters and Scott Parker's side beat the Blades, the Whites would be all-but promoted thanks to their considerably greater goal difference.
